name: Web Charts Conformance Demo
summary: The runnable proof of the CustomChartRenderer contract (#1334) in a real browser: a semantic Vega-Lite L1 ChartSpec + resolved webtheme tokens in, themed and accessible SVG out, scored on the three conformance axes (semantic-fidelity, theme-application, accessibility). The contract is type-only (charts/contract.ts); the native-first SVG renderer, adapters, and the customChartRenderers swap registry are impl in Frontier UI (#1290/#1292), so the demo supplies its own in-demo SVG renderer to prove the contract is realizable. Scored live against the src/cases/webcharts/* cases: one mark per data row at the encoded position/scale, color resolved semantically from the theme palette in token order (no spec hex) and re-themeable, a labelled <figure><table> data fallback derived from the spec, and WAI-ARIA Graphics roles (graphics-document/object/symbol) with labels derived from the encoding.
description:
Concept

The runnable proof of the CustomChartRenderer contract (#1334). A semantic Vega-Lite L1 ChartSpec plus resolved Web Theme tokens in, themed and accessible SVG out — scored on the three conformance axes.

In-demo renderer, not the FUI impl

The contract is type-only (charts/contract.ts); the native-first SVG renderer, every adapter, and the customChartRenderers swap registry are impl and live in Frontier UI (#1292). So this demo supplies its own in-demo SVG renderer — honest for a browser demo — to prove the contract is realizable.

Scored axes

The conformance section scores each axis live against the src/cases/webcharts/* cases: semantic fidelity (one mark per data row, in order, heights proportional to the value), theme application (color resolved from the theme palette in token order, no spec hex, re-themeable), and accessibility (a labelled <figure><table> data fallback derived from the spec + WAI-ARIA Graphics roles with labels derived from the encoding).
